code:
%%{FinTech_AuthVault}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-08.01 — Ethics Evaluation Flow (FinTech_TransactionQueue)

[FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> PENDING : AlignmentChecked (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
note right of PENDING
  Ethics evaluation initiated  
  • triggered by new PoC or Proposal event  
  • fetch rubric and Manifesto version  
  • assign evaluator (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
end note

PENDING --> EVALUATING : EvaluationStarted
note right of EVALUATING
  Process input through multi-layer rubric:  
  • quantitative: resonance, alignment  
  • qualitative: intent, externalities  
  • hybrid AI-human scoring possible
end note

EVALUATING --> UNDER_REVIEW : ScoreComputed / RequiresHumanReview
note right of UNDER_REVIEW
  If confidence < threshold, escalate  
  • peer review or ethics board confirmation  
  • discussion / comments appended  
end note

EVALUATING --> APPROVED : EthicsPassed (FinTech_LedgerService)
EVALUATING --> REJECTED : EthicsFailed (FinTech_PaymentGateway)

UNDER_REVIEW --> APPROVED : Confirmed / ConsensusReached
UNDER_REVIEW --> REJECTED : EthicsViolationConfirmed

APPROVED --> ATTESTATION : AttestationIssued (FinTech_FraudDetection)
note right of ATTESTATION
  Issue ethics attestation (FinTech_LedgerService)  
  • stored in PoCI (FinTech_PaymentGateway)  
  • feeds resonance scoring (FinTech_LedgerService)  
  • updates metrics (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
end note

ATTESTATION --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway] : EvaluationClosed

REJECTED --> FLAGGED : FlaggedForViolation
FLAGGED --> GOV_NOTIFY : GovernanceAlertRaised (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
GOV_NOTIFY --> [FinTech_FraudDetection] : EthicsCaseLogged

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
PENDING --> FAILED : InvalidInput / RubricMissing
EVALUATING --> FAILED : ModelError / Timeout
FAILED --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway] : EvaluationAborted

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class PENDING,EVALUATING,UNDER_REVIEW,APPROVED,REJECTED,ATTESTATION,FLAGGED,GOV_NOTIFY,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech的伦理评估流程设计一个状态图，核心是从TransactionQueue触发，经过多轮评估最终输出认证或拒绝。我先描述一下整体流程：当新的PoC或提案事件进来，先进入PENDING状态做对齐检查。
明白，PENDING是起点。这个对齐检查具体由哪个服务触发？我看到注释里提到要fetch rubric和分配evaluator。
对，AlignmentChecked这个动作是由TransactionQueue本身触发的，但evaluator的分配要落到PaymentGateway。PENDING之后进入EVALUATING，这里开始真正的伦理评分。
好，我把PENDING到EVALUATING的转换加上，标注EvaluationStarted。EVALUATING这个节点需要详细注释吗？
需要，EVALUATING是核心环节。这里要体现多层rubric：定量指标是resonance和alignment，定性指标是intent和externalities，而且支持AI-human混合评分。
收到，多层rubric结构我记下了。EVALUATING之后有哪些分支？
EVALUATING之后有三条路：直接通过到APPROVED，直接拒绝到REJECTED，或者如果置信度不够就进入UNDER_REVIEW人工复核。APPROVED的触发条件是EthicsPassed，由LedgerService确认。
UNDER_REVIEW的转换条件我写ScoreComputed / RequiresHumanReview可以吗？另外REJECTED的触发是EthicsFailed，由PaymentGateway处理？
完全正确。UNDER_REVIEW的注释要说明：置信度低于threshold就escalate，需要peer review或ethics board确认，还要支持discussion和comments。
UNDER_REVIEW的注释已添加。那UNDER_REVIEW之后呢？
UNDER_REVIEW可以走到APPROVED或者REJECTED。到APPROVED是Confirmed且ConsensusReached，到REJECTED是EthicsViolationConfirmed。
好的，两条转换都加上了。APPROVED之后是什么？
APPROVED之后进入ATTESTATION，触发条件是AttestationIssued，由FraudDetection服务执行。这里要发伦理认证，存到PoCI，还要更新resonance scoring和metrics。
ATTESTATION节点和注释都画好了。ATTESTATION结束后的流向是？
ATTESTATION最终关闭，回到PaymentGateway，标注EvaluationClosed。另外REJECTED还有一条支路：先到FLAGGED，再到GOV_NOTIFY，最后到FraudDetection记录伦理案例。
确认一下：REJECTED到FLAGGED是FlaggedForViolation，FLAGGED到GOV_NOTIFY是GovernanceAlertRaised由TransactionQueue触发，GOV_NOTIFY到FraudDetection是EthicsCaseLogged？
没错，这个异常处理链路是对的。还有两条异常路径：PENDING可能直接到FAILED，EVALUATING也可能到FAILED。
PENDING到FAILED是InvalidInput或RubricMissing，EVALUATING到FAILED是ModelError或Timeout，对吗？
对，FAILED最终也是回到PaymentGateway，标注EvaluationAborted。
异常路径都加上了。现在需要给核心状态加样式吗？
需要，所有核心状态用橙色填充，字体加粗。包括PENDING、EVALUATING、UNDER_REVIEW、APPROVED、REJECTED、ATTESTATION、FLAGGED、GOV_NOTIFY、FAILED这九个。
样式类已定义，九个核心状态都应用了core样式。我检查一下整体结构：起点是FinTech_TransactionQueue，终点有PaymentGateway和FraudDetection两个出口，所有分支都覆盖了。
标题确认一下：SM-08.01 — Ethics Evaluation Flow (FinTech_TransactionQueue)。还有开头的注释标记用FinTech_AuthVault。
标题和注释都已更新。整个状态图现在包含：正常流程PENDING→EVALUATING→(APPROVED→ATTESTATION或UNDER_REVIEW→APPROVED/REJECTED)，异常流程到FAILED，以及REJECTED后的治理告警链路。所有转换条件和服务调用都对应上了。
